sources.name: Kolczan/Tibia-Scripts
sources.notes: Original files are not committed. The installer imports the pinned files and validates their Git blob SHA-1 values.

sources.name: OTCv8/otclientv8
sources.notes: Pinned technical upstream for the OTClient/vBot structures used by the package.

cavebot.notes: Pinned route imported at install time, NPC typo patched, markers validated and dry-run generated.

targetbot.notes: Pinned TargetBot imported at install time, lure raised to six and internal looting disabled.

attackbot.notes: Six-step MAX DPS rotation with server-aligned local cooldowns.

healbot.notes: Named healing and mana profile installed disabled.

supplies.notes: UMP, GFB and SD named profile.

refill.notes: Mehkesh and Fenech are validated as the main supply NPCs; the route also includes banking, selling and travel actions.

rollback.notes: Package-specific rollback is implemented and awaits clean-environment validation.

changes: Community sources are imported from a pinned commit instead of being redistributed.
Git blob SHA-1 validation protects the source import.
A dry-run route is generated with CaveBot and TargetBot stopped before automatic hunting.
AttackBot, HealBot and Supplies are separated into named package profiles.
TargetBot lure count is set to six and internal looting is disabled.
A package-specific backup manifest, install report and rollback are included.
All modules remain disabled after installation and restoration.

tests.name: json-load
tests.evidence: The MarolaOT client loaded AttackBot, HealBot and Supplies together.

tests.name: local-combat
tests.evidence: GFB, SD and MS spells were tested locally with GM-created Cobra monsters.

tests.name: route-cycle
tests.evidence: The adapted hunt was used in the MarolaOT environment before packaging.

manualCheckpoints: Use the generated dry-run route before the main route.
Enable AttackBot, HealBot, TargetBot and CaveBot manually and in that order, with CaveBot last.
Validate rollback before publishing the M7 release.
